summary: Single-purpose SQL constant added in package `query`, mirroring the existing PgStatActivityDefault template conventions. Godoc explains positional column order, template variable rules, and the rationale for coalesce/regexp_replace. Tests cover format correctness, both ShowNoIdle branches, QueryAgeThresh embedding, and integration against every supported PG version with t.Skipf for unavailable ones.

dimensionsChecked.architecturalPatterns: pass — follows existing `internal/query/*.go` convention (single exported const, package query, godoc on const)
dimensionsChecked.separationOfConcerns: pass — file contains only SQL template definition, no logic
dimensionsChecked.readability: pass — raw string literal for SQL avoids backslash double-escaping; godoc documents positional column indices (0–6) which downstream tasks depend on
dimensionsChecked.errorHandling: n/a — no runtime code paths in this task
dimensionsChecked.typeSafety: n/a — Go, no generics, single string constant
dimensionsChecked.testingCoverage: adequate — 5 unit tests (default opts, ShowNoIdle on/off, QueryAgeThresh custom and default) plus integration test against 11 PG versions with t.Skipf for unavailable ones; matches `activity_test.go` pattern
dimensionsChecked.dependenciesManagement: pass — uses only existing internal packages (postgres, query) and stdlib (fmt, strings, testing)
dimensionsChecked.security: pass — see dev-security-auditor; QueryAgeThresh is the only template variable that becomes literal SQL, source is internal Options struct not user-controlled in this layer
dimensionsChecked.performance: pass — single query, indexed on pid via ORDER BY pid
dimensionsChecked.crossFileConsistency: pass — verified `query.Options.QueryAgeThresh` and `query.Options.ShowNoIdle` exist in internal/query/query.go; verified `postgres.NewTestConnectVersion` signature matches usage in test file
